conclusion: Optimism is a not_supported coverage record. The CoW orderbook surface returns HTTP 404 on every documented route (prod + barn, v1 + v2); the upstream composable-cow deployment set does not register Optimism; the upstream cow-shed deployment set does not register Optimism. Optimism stays out of the DeploymentChainId enum and lives only as not_supported records in deployment-coverage.yaml.
